scripts.migrate:run: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=apps/api/.env.local node -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/.bin/ts-node -T apps/api/node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:run -d apps/api/src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.migrate:revert: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=apps/api/.env.local node -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/.bin/ts-node -T apps/api/node_modules/typeorm/cli.js migration:revert -d apps/api/src/db/data-source.ts
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune
